title: Define Agentic Streams
details: Formalizing conversations as continuous event ledgers rather than static documents.

title: Define Stream Forking
details: The ability to branch execution traces, akin to git branches.

title: Define Stream Time Travel
details: Navigating backwards in the event ledger to recover context or state.

title: Map AX (Agent Experience) to Streams
details: Interfaces must be designed for programmatic API consumption by agents, not just visual UX.
